extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AVERMAET attacked the uphill finish from 1km out with an extremely early sprint, distancing COSTA and taking both the stage and GC lead.
tactical_patterns: SHETLI collected all intermediate sprint and KOM points from breakaway before being caught, aggressive jersey defense strategy executed perfectly.
BMC Racing took over pacing from Astana with 1km remaining on uphill finish, controlling tempo before leader's launch.
VAN AVERMAET initiated sprint unusually early for uphill finish, suggesting superior power endurance over pure puncheur acceleration.

rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: positive: initiated sprint 1km from uphill finish line, demonstrating exceptional sustained power to hold off pure climbers like Costa
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: negative: unable to close gap despite VAN AVERMAET's early sprint initiation, suggesting reduced form or tactical miscalculation
rider_signals.SHETLI Loic: positive: systematically collected all intermediate sprint and KOM points before expending completely, intelligent jersey hunting execution
rider_signals.KANGERT Tanel: neutral: showed well for Astana before BMC takeover, but team ceded control at critical final kilometer
